Senior Backend Engineer
Klarna  Stockholm  Hybrid

About Klarna
Klarna is reinventing how people shop and pay. We're hiring backend engineers to scale our checkout infrastructure.

The role
You'll join our checkout platform team. We use:
- Java 21
- Spring Boot
- PostgreSQL
- Kafka
- Kubernetes on AWS

You'll work on:
- Building APIs that handle 100k+ requests/second
- Improving observability across our services
- Mentoring junior engineers

Must have:
- 5+ years of Java backend experience
- Production experience with distributed systems
- Solid PostgreSQL skills

Bonus:
- Kafka experience
- Open source contributions

Salary: SEK 850-1100k.
